headlines.title: Democrat Rebecca Bennett will take on GOP Rep. Tom Kean Jr., who has been absent from Congress
headlines.description: Rebecca Bennett, a former Navy helicopter pilot and healthcare executive, has won the Democratic primary in New Jersey’s 7th Congressional District, NBC News projects, setting up a general election campaign against Republican Rep. Tom Kean Jr.

headlines.title: Former Interior Secretary Deb Haaland wins Democratic nomination in New Mexico governor’s race
headlines.description: Former Interior Secretary Deb Haaland has won the Democratic primary in New Mexico’s race for governor, NBC News projects

headlines.title: Supreme Court allows Alabama to use congressional map that eliminates a majority-Black district
headlines.description: The Supreme Court allowed Alabama to use a congressional map that eliminates one of two majority-Black districts in the state in a win for Republicans.

headlines.title: U.S. and Iran exchange new attacks in Persian Gulf, CENTCOM says
headlines.description: Multiple Iranian rocket and drone attacks were thwarted in the Persian Gulf and the U.S. military carried out an attack on Qeshm Island on Tuesday, according to U.S.

headlines.title: Josh Turek wins Democratic primary in battleground Iowa Senate race
headlines.description: Iowa state Rep. Josh Turek has won the Democratic nomination for his state’s open U.S.

headlines.title: Steve Kornacki tracks the race for Los Angeles mayor
headlines.description: NBC News' Steve Kornacki is tracking the races and current predictions for California governor and Los Angeles mayor during the primary election.

headlines.title: Former reality star Spencer Pratt faces off with LA's mayor in primary tonight
headlines.description: Former Reality TV star Spencer Pratt takes on LA Mayor Karen Bass and Progressive Council Woman Nithya Raman ramen in tonight’s primary. NBC News’ Liz Kreutz reports.

headlines.title: Trump to speak at rescheduled White House Correspondents' Dinner
headlines.description: President Donald Trump announced that he would attend the rescheduled White House Correspondets' Dinner in July after the event in April was abruptly cut short when a gunman ran through a security checkpoint. NBC News' Monica Alba reports.

headlines.title: Massive leadership vacuum weakens U.S. diplomacy in the face of global crises
headlines.description: Hundreds of diplomats have been forced to retire or were laid off in the Trump administration

headlines.title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio
headlines.description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

headlines.title: Maine’s Graham Platner meets with Democratic senators amid controversy
headlines.description: Graham Platner visited Washington on Tuesday to meet with Democrats amid fresh controversy.

headlines.title: Jan. 6 defendant who said he was ashamed of ‘foolish’ actions now works at Pentagon
headlines.description: Jan. 6 defendant now works at Pentagon
